pageContext.name: Boba Fett
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are excited to present the Boba Fett Bust in pewter, on a pedestal of composite resin.  The lack of a stormtrooper scowl or Vader grimace does little to quell the unease when facing Boba Fett. Devoid of any apparent expression, his inscrutable helmet underscores the cold-blooded efficiency with which the famed bounty hunter approaches his profession.  Every detail of Fett's armor is meticulously reproduced in this limited edition. Braided Wookiee scalps and battle suit quilting offset the engineered precision of the Duraplast armor and the helmet with its distinctive targeting rangefinder. The Mythosaur skull emblem, clan sigil, and signature dents complete the look.   Don't miss your chance to add this Boba Fett Bust to your Star Wars collection.
